Principle Investigator

Liu Yang

Assistant Professor (NUS Presidential Young Professorship), from July 2024
email: yangliu at nus dot edu dot sg
office: Room 08-09, Block S17, 10 Lower Kent Ridge Road, Singapore 119076 (Maps, Directions)

  • Curriculum Vitae, Google Scholar
  • Assistant Adjunct Professor (postdoc), UCLA 2022-2024, with Stanley Osher
  • Ph.D. Brown University 2021, with George Em Karniadakis
  • B.E. Tsinghua University 2016, Tsien Hsue-shen Elite Class
